sections.heading: Capability 1

fields.Title: Electromagnetic Worldview
fields.Lede: From Maxwell’s equations to engineering-grade ray tracing — turning invisible waves into knowable, measurable, predictable engineering objects.

items.title: Title
items.text: Electromagnetic Worldview

items.title: Lede
items.text: From Maxwell’s equations to engineering-grade ray tracing — turning invisible waves into knowable, measurable, predictable engineering objects.

bullets: Deterministic ray tracing SBR / Image / UTD

fields.Title: GPU-Accelerated Stack
fields.Lede: Bringing EM computation onto the GPU — zero-copy VRAM, a single engine to 325 GHz, so simulation and the terminal runtime share one accelerated base.

items.title: Title
items.text: GPU-Accelerated Stack

items.title: Lede
items.text: Bringing EM computation onto the GPU — zero-copy VRAM, a single engine to 325 GHz, so simulation and the terminal runtime share one accelerated base.

fields.Title: AI-Native Methodology
fields.Lede: Writing PHY / MAC as trainable models — OTA evolution, staged rollout, safe rollback — so communication iterates like software.

items.title: Title
items.text: AI-Native Methodology

items.title: Lede
items.text: Writing PHY / MAC as trainable models — OTA evolution, staged rollout, safe rollback — so communication iterates like software.

fields.Title: The Data Flywheel
fields.Lede: Open datasets + open training pipelines + open benchmarks — simulate, run on terminals, feed back the twin; each turn closer to reality.

sections.heading: Capability 1

fields.Title: 电磁世界观
fields.Lede: 从 Maxwell 方程到工程级射线追踪——把不可见的电磁波，变成可知、可测、可预测的工程对象。

items.title: Title
items.text: 电磁世界观

items.title: Lede
items.text: 从 Maxwell 方程到工程级射线追踪——把不可见的电磁波，变成可知、可测、可预测的工程对象。

bullets: 确定性射线跟踪 SBR / Image / UTD

fields.Title: GPU 加速计算栈
fields.Lede: 把电磁计算搬上 GPU——零拷贝显存、单引擎覆盖至 325 GHz，让仿真与终端运行时共享同一套加速底座。

items.title: Title
items.text: GPU 加速计算栈

items.title: Lede
items.text: 把电磁计算搬上 GPU——零拷贝显存、单引擎覆盖至 325 GHz，让仿真与终端运行时共享同一套加速底座。

sections.heading: Capability 3

fields.Title: AI-Native 方法论
fields.Lede: 把 PHY / MAC 写成可训练模型——OTA 演进、灰度发布、安全回滚，让通信像软件一样持续迭代。

items.title: Title
items.text: AI-Native 方法论

items.title: Lede
items.text: 把 PHY / MAC 写成可训练模型——OTA 演进、灰度发布、安全回滚，让通信像软件一样持续迭代。

bullets: 灰度发布 + 安全回滚

fields.Title: 数据飞轮
fields.Lede: 公开数据集 + 公开训练管线 + 公开评测基准——仿真生成、终端实跑、反哺孪生，越转越逼近现实。
